mapper.select:
select pi.id, pi.instance_code as code, pi.instance_name as name, pp.plugin_code as package_code, pp.plugin_name as package_name, pc.capability_code, pc.extension_point, pc.stage_code, pp.version, pi.status, pi.fail_mode, pi.timeout_ms, pi.config_json from plugin_instances pi inner join plugin_packages pp on pp.id = pi.package_id inner join plugin_capabilities pc on pc.id = pi.capability_id
and ( pi.instance_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or pi.instance_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or pp.plugin_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or pc.capability_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and pi.status = #{status}
order by pi.id desc

select pi.id, pi.instance_code as code, pi.instance_name as name, pp.plugin_code as package_code, pp.plugin_name as package_name, pc.capability_code, pc.extension_point, pc.stage_code, pp.version, pi.status, pi.fail_mode, pi.timeout_ms, pi.config_json from plugin_instances pi inner join plugin_packages pp on pp.id = pi.package_id inner join plugin_capabilities pc on pc.id = pi.capability_id where pi.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into plugin_instances( package_id, capability_id, instance_code, instance_name, config_json, status, fail_mode, timeout_ms, concurrency_limit ) values( (select id from plugin_packages where plugin_code = #{packageCode} limit 1), (select pc.id from plugin_capabilities pc inner join plugin_packages pp on pp.id = pc.package_id where pp.plugin_code = #{packageCode} and pc.capability_code = #{capabilityCode} limit 1), #{code}, #{name}, #{configJson}, #{status}, #{failMode}, #{timeoutMs}, 0 )
mapper.select: select pb.id, pb.instance_id, pi.instance_code, pi.instance_name, pp.plugin_code as package_code, pp.plugin_name as package_name, pc.capability_code, pc.extension_point, pb.stage_code, pb.scope_type, pb.scope_ref_id, pb.order_no, pb.status, coalesce(pb.binding_config_json, pi.config_json) as config_json, pi.fail_mode, pi.timeout_ms from plugin_bindings pb inner join plugin_instances pi on pi.id = pb.instance_id inner join plugin_packages pp on pp.id = pi.package_id inner join plugin_capabilities pc on pc.id = pi.capability_id where pb.status = 'ACTIVE' and pi.status = 'ACTIVE' and pp.status = 'ACTIVE' and pc.status = 'ACTIVE' and pc.extension_point = #{extensionPoint} and pb.stage_code = #{stageCode} order by pb.order_no asc, pb.id asc
